## Summary

One paragraph describing what this PR changes and why.

## Motivation / context

Link the related issue (e.g. `Closes #123`) and give any background a reviewer
needs to understand the change.

## Testing

How was this change validated? Include commands run, test cases added, and any
manual verification steps.

## Screenshots / recordings

Only for UI-affecting changes. Remove this section otherwise.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally
- [ ] Added/updated tests for changed behavior
- [ ] Docs updated (if applicable)
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry (for user-facing changes)
- [ ] Conventional-commit-style title
